name: Halwani Bros. Co. Ltd.
summary: Halwani Bros. Co. Ltd. produces, manufactures, and distributes food products in the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia. It offers Middle Eastern food products, such as sweets; meat products; breaded chicken and burgers; jams; dairy products; cheese; juices; provisions, such as olive oil, olives, peppers, and pickles; bakery products stuffed with dates, and packaging products. The company was founded in 1950 and is headquartered in Jeddah, the Kingdom of Saudi Arabia.
